brief_notes: Comprehensive neuroscience modeling paper (69 stat sentences in extraction). Key numbers verified: 3-6% age-related myelin alterations, 90% increase paranodal profiles, 30% synapse loss, 50 axon models, 30 trials, CV slowed by 38±10% / 72±8%, AP failure 35±13% / 45±13%, remyelination recovery 14.6±5.1% and 1.8±1.1%. 5 figures. Good structure and discussion.
